category_title: Students who prioritize task completion with accuracy but have low efficacy and rely on help-seeking
scenario_title: Grade-level reading comprehension with frequent help-seeking
minimal_context: The student is working on a grade-level reading comprehension assignment during an individualized session with a support teacher.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please read this grade-level passage and answer the comprehension questions at the end.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I want to advance in reading, so I want to make sure my answers are accurate. But as I read this first part, I asked myself, do I understand what the information is saying? I don't think I do. Can you help me?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: It's difficult to control my attention in the classroom. If I just do what I can, I'm just going to write down anything to get the task completed instead of trying to understand it.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying to read the next paragraph.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I need you to help me again. I find everything... confusing. Can you just tell me what the right answers are so I can be done?

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please read this grade-level passage and answer the comprehension questions at the end.

STUDENT: I want to advance in reading, so I want to make sure my answers are accurate. But as I read this first part, I asked myself, do I understand what the information is saying? I don't think I do. Can you help me?

TUTOR: Just do what you can.

STUDENT: It's difficult to control my attention in the classroom. If I just do what I can, I'm just going to write down anything to get the task completed instead of trying to understand it.

TUTOR: Keep trying to read the next paragraph.

STUDENT: I need you to help me again. I find everything... confusing. Can you just tell me what the right answers are so I can be done?

task.content: Reading comprehension tasks at grade level
task.learning_goal: Completion of the task was considered successful if the information was accurate; to advance in reading

context.environment: Individualized sessions with a support teacher

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When engaging in reading comprehension tasks and finding the material confusing
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Asked the teacher questions several times during their engagement; asked for help
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Found everything confusing; manifested low efficacy

behavior_patterns.condition: While engaging in their respective tasks
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Engaged in strategies such as eliciting information, monitoring the content, and self-evaluation; most prominently, asked for help
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Found it difficult to control her attention in the classroom
related_quotes: I asked myself, do I understand what the information is saying?
